head.hi: The Acting Secretary of State to the Legation in Laos
head.note: Repeated for information to Saigon and Manila and pouched to Phnom Penh.

div.p:
18. Robertson today informed Laotian ChargéPresumably Inpeng Suryadhay. that US understood Laotian Government as well as Vietnamese and Cambodian Governments wished to have included in proposed SEA Treaty a clause to effect that overt aggression against Laos or against free
Vietnam or Cambodia would be considered aggression against Pact members although these three countries could not join pact at this time. Robertson said US would advocate at Manila inclusion of Laos, free Vietnam and Cambodia within area covered by treaty against armed aggression if this was wish of three governments. Chargé replied that he was confident this would be most acceptable to his government which had in fact just telegraphed regarding possibility of Laotian membership in Pact.
Departments suggests you confirm this conversation with Foreign or Prime Minister at your discretion.
